seoTitle: Kerewong vs Keri Keri — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kerewong and Keri Keri. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Kerewong vs Keri Keri: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kerewong and Keri Keri.
heading: Kerewong vs Keri Keri — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kerewong, New South Wales and Keri Keri, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Keri Keri has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Kerewong (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kerewong or Keri Keri safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kerewong has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Keri Keri scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kerewong scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Keri Keri scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kerewong or Keri Keri?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Keri Keri has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
